artPrompt: A cavernous concrete parking deck plunging downward in steep perspective, identical pillars marching into cyan-tinged gloom, oil-stained floor reflecting a single humming fluorescent strip. Empty stalls and a lone curving ramp descend toward a shadow that swallows the light, ivory paint flaking from the low ceiling. No figures, just oppressive municipal vastness and the faint arcane shimmer pooling on wet concrete, rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: Municipal Parking Structure C
text:
{T}: Add {W}.
{T}: Add {C}. Activate only if you control a Bureaucrat, Clerk, Auditor, Notary, or Inspector. (Validated parking.)
flavorText: Level C. Always Level C. No one has ever willingly parked above Level C and returned.
